title: Vanilla Peak
description: Reach the peak of Minecraft performance and polish—without losing the Vanilla feel.
body:
# 🏔️ Vanilla Peak
*Reach the peak of Minecraft performance with QoL enhancements —without losing the Vanilla feel.*

---

## ✨ Overview
**Vanilla Peak** is a **Vanilla+ client modpack** designed for **Survival players** who want Minecraft to run faster, feel smoother, and play more comfortably—while remaining true to the original game.

No gameplay overhauls. No balance changes.  
Just a cleaner, more refined Vanilla experience.

---

## ⚡ Performance First
Built to reduce lag, improve frame rates, and smooth out moment-to-moment gameplay.

- Faster rendering and reduced frame drops  
- Improved memory efficiency and load times  
- Smarter handling of entities and visuals  
- Optimized networking for smoother multiplayer play  

*Minecraft—only faster and more stable.*

---

## 🌿 Visual & Immersion Polish
Subtle enhancements that modernize the look and feel without changing Minecraft’s art style.

- Clean, improved UI elements and overlays  
- Better visual clarity and animation smoothness  
- Ambient and feedback improvements for immersion  
- Optional shader support for enhanced lighting  

*Everything feels more responsive and alive—never overstyled.*

### 🎨 Resource Pack Credits
- **Vanilla Tweaks** — https://vanillatweaks.net/  
  Used for select visual and quality-of-life resource pack elements.

---

## 🧭 Quality of Life Improvements
Thoughtful tweaks that reduce friction and improve everyday play.

- Clearer HUD information and status feedback  
- Easier inventory management and interaction  
- Helpful overlays for building, lighting, and navigation  
- Better visibility into blocks, items, and mounts  

*Small changes that add up to a better experience.*

---

## 🎙️ Multiplayer-Friendly Tools
Optional features that make playing with others more convenient.

- Enhanced chat clarity and presence indicators  
- Proximity voice chat for immersive interaction  
- Better coordination without disrupting gameplay  

*All features are optional and unobtrusive.*

---

## 🧩 Compatibility & Notes
> 💻 **Client-side modpack**  
> Designed to work smoothly in both single-player and multiplayer environments.

> ⚠️ **Note:** If manually installing shaders, disable **Voxy** to avoid rendering conflicts.

---

## 🧠 Why Vanilla Peak
Vanilla Peak doesn’t change what Minecraft *is*—  
it improves how it *feels* to play.

Faster. Clearer. More comfortable.  
Still unmistakably Minecraft.

---

## 💾 Install
Download **Vanilla Peak** and launch with Fabric your preferred Fabric Launcher
